name: open-elements-public
description: Open Elements marketplace for the Open Elements company- and stack-focused Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: agentic-support-open-elements
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin bundling Open Elements company and product knowledge (company profile, brand guidelines, Support & Care) together with the Open Elements fullstack build conventions: Java backends, TypeScript/Next.js frontends, fullstack architecture, and MkDocs documentation.
